name: beamer
description: Reads and writes Beamer NPS survey responses, announcement posts, feature requests, comments, reactions, votes, and end users through the Beamer REST API.

risk.read: external Beamer API read of NPS feedback, posts, feature requests, comments, reactions, votes, and end users
risk.write: external mutation of Beamer posts, feature requests, comments, reactions, and votes; a published post/feature-request write is immediately end-user-visible in the customer-facing widget
risk.approval: required for every write action; see writes.json risk field per action
